meta.title: EnteleWALLET Lite | Secure Wallet Dashboard for the EnteleKRON Ecosystem
meta.description: Connect, verify and monitor your EnteleKRON ecosystem wallet with EnteleWALLET Lite.

common.connectToView: Connect your wallet to view this page

warnings.liteNotice: EnteleWALLET Lite connects to your existing wallet. It does not store seed phrases, private keys or custody funds.
warnings.signatureNotice: Wallet verification signatures only prove wallet ownership. They do not authorize transfers, spending approvals, payments or blockchain transactions.
warnings.maliciousSignature: A signature request that asks you to approve spending, or that does not clearly say this does not authorize a transaction, is not an EnteleWALLET verification request — do not sign it.
warnings.domainCheck: Always verify official domains before connecting a wallet.
warnings.seedPhrase: EnteleWALLET, EnteleKRON, TVK Group, TVK Labs, SOVRA, support staff, partners and moderators will never ask for seed phrases, private keys or recovery phrases.

home.heroHeadline: Connect, verify and monitor your EnteleKRON ecosystem wallet.
home.heroSubtitle: A secure wallet-connected dashboard for ENK, SOVRA, EnergieMIND and future TVK Group ecosystem assets.
home.roadmapBlock: Full EnteleWALLET will be a future non-custodial wallet phase and requires security architecture, independent audits and legal review before private-key features are implemented.

connect.title: Wallet verbinden
connect.description: Connect your existing wallet and verify ownership securely.
connect.verifyPrompt: Verify your wallet ownership with a safe SIWE signature. No gas fees. No transactions.
connect.wrongNetwork: Please switch to a supported network
connect.walletConnectMissing: WalletConnect is not configured. Set NEXT_PUBLIC_WALLETCONNECT_PROJECT_ID to enable.
connect.walletConnectDevWarning: WalletConnect Project ID is missing. WalletConnect wallets will be unavailable.
connect.walletConnectUnavailable: WalletConnect is temporarily unavailable. Please use a browser wallet or contact support.
connect.notLinked: This wallet is verified but not yet linked to an EnteleWALLET or EnteleKRON account.
connect.ackCheckbox: I understand that EnteleWALLET Lite does not custody funds, does not store seed phrases or private keys, and that wallet verification signatures do not authorize transfers or spending.
connect.ackRequired: Please confirm the safety notice before connecting.
connect.noticeIntro: EnteleWALLET Lite connects to your existing wallet only.
connect.noticeNeverShare: Never share your seed phrase, private key, recovery phrase or wallet password.
connect.noticeDomain: Before connecting, verify that you are on: https://entelewallet.app
connect.noticePayments: Do not send funds to any address unless the instruction appears inside your approved EnteleKRON investor dashboard.
connect.noticeRisk: Digital assets involve significant risk. EnteleWALLET does not guarantee token value, liquidity, listing or returns.
connect.noticeUnderstand: Never sign messages you do not understand.
connect.noWalletDetected: No wallet detected in this browser
connect.connectionTimedOut: Connection timed out — please try again
connect.modalUnavailable: Wallet modal unavailable — refresh the page

preConnect.title: Before you connect
preConnect.subtitle: Review these safety notices before connecting your wallet.

overview.title: Wallet Overview
overview.description: Your connected wallet dashboard and ecosystem status.

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.indexingFuture: Detailed transaction indexing will be added in a future release.

vesting.title: Vesting
vesting.description: View your ENK vesting schedule and unlock status.
vesting.notLinked: Link your verified EnteleKRON investor account to view vesting details.

claims.title: Claims
claims.notOpen: Token claims are not open yet.

security.title: Security Center
security.description: Security guidance, official domains and phishing protection.
security.signatureSafetyDetail: EnteleWALLET Lite signatures only verify wallet ownership. They do not transfer funds, approve spending, or cost gas.
security.walletConnectDetail: Only connect through the official EnteleWALLET app at entelewallet.app. Verify the domain shown in your wallet matches entelewallet.app.
security.reportConcernIntro: If you suspect phishing, a fake domain, a suspicious signature request, or a fake support account, report it to:

transparency.title: Transparency Center
transparency.description: Official EnteleKRON and EnteleWALLET transparency information.
transparency.externalLink: View full Transparency Center on EnteleKRON
transparency.safetyNotice: Always verify official addresses inside EnteleWALLET or EnteleKRON official dashboards. Never trust wallet addresses sent through social media, Telegram, Discord, X, Instagram, WhatsApp, email or direct messages.
transparency.paymentWarning: Do not send funds to any address unless the instruction appears inside your approved EnteleKRON investor dashboard.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage connected wallets and verification settings.
settings.unlinkConfirm: Are you sure you want to unlink this wallet?

account.title: Account
account.description: Manage your EnteleWALLET account and linked wallets.

support.title: Support
support.description: Report security concerns or get help.
support.channelNotice: Security reports are sent to the EnteleWALLET security channel. Do not include seed phrases, private keys, recovery phrases, wallet passwords or personal secrets.
support.formSuccess: Report received. Our security/support team will review it. Never send seed phrases, private keys or wallet passwords.
support.formError: Submission failed. Please use the email fallback below.
support.providerSupabase: Reports are stored securely via Supabase.
support.providerMailto: Reports open your email client (mailto fallback).

install.title: Install EnteleWALLET
install.description: Install entelewallet.app as a progressive web app on your device.
install.iphoneSteps: Open entelewallet.app in Safari → Share → Add to Home Screen.
install.androidSteps: Open entelewallet.app in Chrome → Install app / Add to Home screen.
install.desktopSteps: Open entelewallet.app in Chrome or Edge → Use the install icon in the address bar.
install.storeFuture: App Store and Google Play listings are planned for a future phase after security and legal review. They are not available yet.

officialDomains.title: Official Domains
officialDomains.description: Only connect your wallet on domains listed here.
officialDomains.warning: If a domain is not listed here, do not connect your wallet or sign messages there.
officialDomains.entelekron: Official EnteleKRON website and token sale platform

roadmap.title: Roadmap
roadmap.description: EnteleWALLET development phases and future features.
roadmap.futureNotice: Future phase — not active in EnteleWALLET Lite.

legal.title: Legal & Risk Notice
legal.description: Important legal information about EnteleWALLET Lite.
legal.disclaimer: EnteleWALLET Lite is a wallet connection and verification interface. It does not custody funds, store seed phrases, provide investment advice, provide legal or tax advice, or guarantee token value, liquidity, listing or returns.
legal.noCustodyDetail: EnteleWALLET Lite never holds or controls your funds.
legal.noFinancialAdviceDetail: Nothing in this app constitutes investment, legal or tax advice.
legal.noGuaranteeDetail: Token value, liquidity, listing and returns are not guaranteed.
legal.userResponsibilityDetail: You are responsible for the security of your wallet and private keys.
legal.cryptoRiskDetail: Crypto-assets involve significant risk including total loss of value.
legal.jurisdictionDetail: Access may be restricted in certain jurisdictions.
legal.futureFeaturesDetail: Future features are subject to legal and security review before activation.

legal.title: Legal | EnteleWALLET Lite
legal.description: Legal and risk notice for EnteleWALLET Lite.

footer.notice: EnteleWALLET Lite does not custody funds, store seed phrases or private keys. Wallet verification signatures do not authorize transfers or spending.

legalPages.privacyBody: EnteleWALLET Lite collects minimal data required for wallet connection and verification. We do not store seed phrases or private keys. Wallet addresses may be logged for verification events when backend storage is enabled.
legalPages.termsBody: By using EnteleWALLET Lite you agree this is a wallet connection interface only. No custody, no investment advice, no guarantee of token value or returns.
legalPages.riskBody: Digital assets involve significant risk including total loss. Wallet connection does not equal investment approval. Token claims are not open unless officially announced.
legalPages.disclaimerBody: EnteleWALLET Lite provides no financial, legal or tax advice. All payments must follow approved EnteleKRON investor dashboard instructions only.
